auth.label: API Key
auth.description: U301 API key sent with the Authorization Bearer header. Create it in the U301 dashboard: https://u301.com/app/api-key

extraFields.label: Workspace ID
extraFields.description: Workspace identifier required by U301 for multi-tenant routing. Copy it from the U301 dashboard or your API examples after creating a workspace: https://u301.com/docs/u301-js

actions.name: delete_link
actions.description: Delete one U301 short link by its domain/slug identifier.

shortlink.description: The short link identifier in the form domain/slug, for example u301.co/abc123.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for deleting one U301 short link.

success.description: Whether U301 confirmed the short link deletion.

anyOf.description: The upstream success message returned by U301.

outputSchema.description: The result returned after deleting one U301 short link.

actions.name: list_domains
actions.description: List the U301 short-link domains available in the connected workspace.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for listing U301 domains.

randomCodeLength.description: The random code length used when U301 generates a slug.

isPrimary.description: Whether this domain is the primary domain for the workspace.

isGlobal.description: Whether this domain is a global U301 domain.

items.description: A domain available for U301 short links.

domains.description: The domains available in the workspace.

actions.name: shorten_link
actions.description: Create one U301 short link for a destination URL.

domain.description: The domain to use for the short link.

slug.description: The custom slug to use instead of a random code.

reuseExisting.description: Whether U301 should reuse an existing short link when the destination URL already exists.

password.description: An optional password required before opening the short link.

comment.description: An optional note stored with the short link.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for creating one U301 short link.

isCustomSlug.description: Whether the slug was provided by the user.

domain.description: The domain used for the short link.

isReused.description: Whether U301 reused an existing short link for the same URL.

shortLink.description: The final short link in domain/slug form.

anyOf.description: The optional comment stored with the short link.
